glosses.vi: bài thuyết trình; bài trình bày
glosses.ja: プレゼンテーション; 発表

sentences.target: Meine Präsentation beginnt in zehn Minuten.

translations.de: Meine Präsentation beginnt in zehn Minuten.
translations.en: My presentation starts in ten minutes.
translations.es: Mi presentación empieza en diez minutos.
translations.fr: Ma présentation commence dans dix minutes.
translations.it: La mia presentazione inizia tra dieci minuti.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的演示在十分钟后开始。
translations.yue: 我嘅簡報再過十分鐘就開始。
translations.ru: Моя презентация начнётся через десять минут.
translations.pt: Minha apresentação começa em dez minutos.
translations.he: המצגת שלי מתחילה בעוד עשר דקות.
translations.vi: Bài thuyết trình của tôi sẽ bắt đầu sau mười phút.
translations.nl: Mijn presentatie begint over tien minuten.
translations.uk: Моя презентація почнеться за десять хвилин.
translations.hu: A bemutatóm tíz perc múlva kezdődik.
translations.hi: मेरी प्रस्तुति दस मिनट बाद शुरू होगी.
translations.pl: Moja prezentacja zaczyna się za dziesięć minut.
translations.el: Η παρουσίασή μου ξεκινά σε δέκα λεπτά.
translations.nb: Presentasjonen min starter om ti minutter.
translations.id: Presentasi saya dimulai dalam sepuluh menit.
translations.sv: Min presentation börjar om tio minuter.
translations.ro: Prezentarea mea începe în zece minute.
translations.cs: Moje prezentace začne za deset minut.
translations.da: Min præsentation starter om ti minutter.
translations.ja: 私のプレゼンは10分後に始まります。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular), agrees with a feminine singular noun in nominative; modifies the subject noun.
Common noun, feminine, singular, nominative; grammatical subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with the subject.
Preposition marking a temporal adverbial; governs dative (here plural) in time expressions.
Cardinal numeral; quantifies the following noun within the prepositional phrase.
Common noun, feminine, plural, dative; object of the preposition ‘in’, functioning as a temporal complement.

translations.vi: Tôi đang chỉnh sửa bài thuyết trình.
translations.nl: Ik ben de presentatie aan het aanpassen.
translations.hi: मैं प्रस्तुति संशोधित कर रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg holder på å redigere presentasjonen.
translations.ja: 今、プレゼンを見直しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; inseparable prefix verb; transitive, taking a direct object.
Temporal adverb indicating ongoing action; modifies the verb phrase.
Definite article; feminine singular accusative; marks the direct object noun.
Common noun, feminine, singular, accusative; direct object of the verb.

sentences.target: Die Präsentation war heute echt stressig.

translations.de: Die Präsentation war heute echt stressig.
translations.en: The presentation was really stressful today.
translations.es: La presentación de hoy fue muy estresante.
translations.fr: La présentation d'aujourd'hui était vraiment stressante.
translations.it: La presentazione di oggi è stata davvero stressante.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天的演示真的很紧张。
translations.yue: 今日個簡報真係好大壓力。
translations.pt: A apresentação de hoje foi muito estressante.
translations.vi: Buổi thuyết trình hôm nay thật căng thẳng.
translations.nl: De presentatie van vandaag was echt stressvol.
translations.hu: A mai prezentáció nagyon stresszes volt.
translations.hi: आज की प्रस्तुति सच में बहुत तनावपूर्ण थी.
translations.el: Η σημερινή παρουσίαση ήταν πραγματικά αγχωτική.
translations.nb: Presentasjonen i dag var veldig stressende.
translations.id: Presentasi hari ini benar-benar bikin stres.
translations.ro: Prezentarea de azi a fost foarte stresantă.
translations.fi: Tämän päivän esitys oli tosi stressaava.
translations.ja: 今日のプレゼンは本当に大変だった。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine singular nominative; marks the subject noun.
Common noun, feminine, singular, nominative; grammatical subject.
Copular auxiliary, preterite, 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicative complement.
Temporal adverb specifying the time; modifies the clause.
Degree adverb/intensifier; modifies the adjective.
Predicative adjective (positive degree); complement of the copula.

translations.en: Tom is about to show his presentation.
translations.es: Tom está a punto de hacer su presentación.
translations.it: Tom sta per fare la sua presentazione.
translations.zh-Hans: 汤姆马上就要开始他的演示。
translations.pt: Tom está prestes a fazer sua apresentação.
translations.he: טום עומד להציג את המצגת שלו.
translations.vi: Tom sắp bắt đầu bài thuyết trình của mình.
translations.ar: توم على وشك أن يبدأ عرضه.
translations.nl: Tom gaat zo zijn presentatie geven.
translations.hi: टॉम अभी अपनी प्रस्तुति शुरू करने वाला है.
translations.pl: Tom za chwilę zacznie swoją prezentację.
translations.el: Ο Τομ είναι έτοιμος να ξεκινήσει την παρουσίασή του.
translations.nb: Tom er i ferd med å starte presentasjonen sin.
translations.sv: Tom ska strax börja sin presentation.
translations.ro: Tom este pe cale să-și înceapă prezentarea.
translations.cs: Tom se chystá začít svou prezentaci.
translations.da: Tom er ved at starte sin præsentation.
translations.ja: トムはもうすぐプレゼンを始める。

tokens.explanation: Proper noun, masculine, singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, selecting a direct object.
Temporal adverb meaning ‘in a moment’; modifies the verb phrase.
Possessive determiner (3rd person singular), agrees with a feminine singular noun in accusative; modifies the object noun.
Common noun, feminine, singular, accusative; direct object of the verb.
